name_cn:
Black Lambskin with Gold Hardware · 22cm
The most elegant Sac de Day series, a timeless classic. Exquisite lambskin leather with a rich luster, very luxurious! The strap is adjustable, choose the length you prefer. The logo is very small, perfectly embodying the style of understated luxury~
Model: 717440
Size: 22x18x10.5cm
